description: TUI is a travel company brand. On the fos.tui domain, the only verified programmatic integration surface found was an MCP server endpoint.
summary: TUI exposes a public MCP server at https://openai-app-mcp-apps.prod.fos.tui/fos-mcp-app-openai-prod/mcp; no other public developer integration surfaces were found on fos.tui.
